summary: All unauthenticated access attempts were properly rejected with 401 Unauthorized responses and a consistent {"error":"Unauthorized"} JSON body. Listing tasks, creating tasks, reading a specific task, and deleting a task all returned 401 without auth. The 'Sneaky task' creation attempt was confirmed to have no side effects — no such task exists when querying as an authenticated user. Break-phase testing with forged tokens, ID guessing, and direct URL access all properly denied access.

steps.action: GET /api/tasks without authentication to list all tasks
steps.verification: Received HTTP 401 with body {"error":"Unauthorized"}. No task data leaked.

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Sneaky task' without authentication
steps.verification: Received HTTP 401 with body {"error":"Unauthorized"}. Logged in as Alice and confirmed 0 tasks with 'Sneaky' in the title exist — no task was created.

steps.action: GET /api/tasks/some-fake-id-12345 without authentication to read a specific task
steps.verification: Received HTTP 401 with body {"error":"Unauthorized"}. No task data leaked.

steps.action: DELETE /api/tasks/some-fake-id-12345 without authentication to delete a task
steps.verification: Received HTTP 401 with body {"error":"Unauthorized"}. Operation was rejected.

break_findings.description: Accessed /tasks page directly without authentication via curl -L
break_findings.result: Returned HTTP 404. No task data was exposed. The page either doesn't exist as a standalone route or is handled client-side.

break_findings.description: Tried various ID formats (1, 2, 3, 1234, 'admin', CUID-like string) against /api/tasks/:id without auth
break_findings.result: All returned 401 Unauthorized consistently. Auth check happens before ID validation, which is correct — no information leakage about which IDs exist.

break_findings.description: Sent requests with fake Bearer token and fake session cookie
break_findings.result: Both returned 401 Unauthorized. Forged credentials are properly rejected.

break_findings.description: Attempted PUT /api/tasks/some-fake-id-12345 with updated title without auth
break_findings.result: Returned 401 Unauthorized. Update operation properly protected.
